name: sugar-pep-bootstrap-verifier

acceptedTools.name: recompute-spec-cids
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute spec CIDs and candidate catalog CID.

acceptedTools.name: compute_fixture_cid
acceptedTools.purpose: Recompute JCS-based CIDs for catalog snapshots and PEP JSON bodies.

acceptedManualAssertions: The only catalog property modified in v1.6.3 is lift-plugin-protocol.
The modified property formalizes identify-only package inspection over the existing sugar-lift/1 method.
No language kit must change emitted ProofIR, canonicalization, all-layer lifting, or verification behavior to remain v1.6.3 compatible.
